headline: Johnson Controls (JCI) Stock Looks Fully Priced On Its 136% Run
summary: Johnson Controls International has delivered a strong 136.3% return over the past 5 years. However, at around US$146 per share, both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and the earnings-based multiples currently point to the stock trading at a premium rather than at a clear discount. A 136.3% gain over 5 years suggests investors have already priced in a lot of good news, so fresh upside may depend on how the fundamentals evolve from here. Analyst upgrades tied to data...

headline: Johnson Controls (JCI) Stock Gets Fair Value Boost As Analysts Weigh Data Center Demand
summary: The latest update to Johnson Controls International’s valuation framework includes a higher assessed fair value per share, with the price target moving from US$138.11 to US$155.21. This reset lines up with fresh analyst research that weighs growing interest in data center exposure and internal transformation efforts against ongoing execution questions and mixed views on portfolio moves. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader analyst debate and how to...
